subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou gaze with the eye of thy heart toward the Most Exalted Horizon, and with the ear of thy soul hearken to the call of the Best-Beloved of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعین قلب بافق اعلی ناظر باشی و بگوش جان ندای محبوب امکانرا استماع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
